3015060.name: Tower! Simulator 3 - KONT Airport
3015060.description:
Ontario International Airport (IATA: ONT, ICAO: KONT, FAA LID: ONT) is an international airport in San Bernardino, gateway to Southern California.


Features:
- Realistic modeling with over 50 custom modeled buildings.
- Detailed ground polygon model
- Taxi signs
- Runway approach lighting.
- OSM (open street map) background buildings and roads
- Beautiful background scenery.

The airport covers 1,741 acres (705 ha) and has two parallel runways. It is the West Coast air and truck hub for UPS Airlines and is a major distribution point for FedEx Express. Since Ontario's longest runway (runway 8L/26R) is longer than three of the four runways at Los Angeles International Airport (LAX), it is an alternate landing site for large aircraft destined for LAX.
